name: Nifty Thrifty Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups chopped cooked chicken, turkey, ham or 2 cans drained tuna
2 oz. jar pimiento, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles according to package directions. Drain.
2. Add margarine, celery salt, and pepper to the cooked noodles. Toss lightly.
3. In a large bowl, combine the noodles, spinach, meat (chicken, turkey, ham, or tuna), mushrooms, cottage cheese, pimiento, and Cheddar cheese.
4. Spoon the mixture into a 3-quart casserole dish.
5. Bake for 30-35 minutes at 350°F. Stir 2-3 times during cooking to ensure the spinach does not dry out.
